Sandbox_IKappaIDPinkSlip_Enable_tooltip: Turns vehicle claim and deploy behavior on or off.
Sandbox_IKappaIDPinkSlip_MaxFilledSlipsP: Limits how many filled Pink Slips one player can hold.
Sandbox_IKappaIDPinkSlip_ClaimDistance_t: Maximum distance, in tiles, from which a player can claim a vehicle.
Sandbox_IKappaIDPinkSlip_RequireEmptyVeh: Prevents claiming a vehicle while another player is sitting in it.
Sandbox_IKappaIDPinkSlip_OwnerLockOnDepl: Only the player registered on the filled Pink Slip can deploy it. Trade the slip, then the new holder can right-click it and register the title.
Sandbox_IKappaIDPinkSlip_ShowQuickButton: Shows the left-side Pink Slip quick deploy icon. Disabled by default.
Sandbox_IKappaIDPinkSlip_MovableQuickBut: When enabled, you can drag the quick deploy icon and its position is saved per player.
